overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a dawn walk through the Little Seoul neighborhood of Los Santos. The player examines posters on a wall, walks past Korean storefronts, explores a parking lot, and crosses a city intersection with light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk corner with commercial storefronts

events.description: camera stops to examine posters and flyers on utility pole wall

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk then stopping to look closely at various posters including a lost cat notice and business sale signs

entered.detail: beige building with dark green striped awning and metal security gates
concrete utility pole covered with various flyers and advertisements
striped yellow and black traffic bollards near corner

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a city sidewalk corner with a beige commercial building. Two pedestrians stand conversing on the right. The camera walks forward and stops to examine various posters on a wall, including a lost cat notice and business sale signs, before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street transitioning to rear parking area

events.description: turns right into parking lot behind commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking past a 24/7 convenience store and turning into a back parking lot area

entered.detail: convenience store with illuminated signage and Korean text
asphalt parking area behind commercial buildings with various store signs
multiple business signs with Korean characters visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera walks past a 24/7 convenience store with Korean signage, then turns right into a rear parking lot. The area is enclosed by buildings on multiple sides with various business signs visible in the background.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at upper floors and billboard on building

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk looking at various storefronts and occasionally looking up at building facades and billboards

entered.detail: brown awning with coffee cup logo and Korean text
large vertical billboard mounted on building facade
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the parking lot, the camera continues down the commercial sidewalk past various storefronts with Korean signage. The camera tilts up to examine a large billboard on an upper building floor before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with multi-lane road

events.description: black SUV drives past on the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking toward intersection while observing passing traffic and street elements

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving along the street past the camera position

entered.detail: street intersection with marked crosswalks and traffic control
blue postal mailbox on sidewalk corner
yellow fire hydrant near street corner

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide urban intersection with the sun backlighting the distant skyscrapers. A black SUV drives past on the street. Street furniture including a mailbox and fire hydrant become visible on the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic control

events.description: traffic light shows green signal, pedestrian crossing permitted

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, observing traffic signals and surrounding buildings

entered.detail: construction crane visible above distant buildings
modern glass and steel skyscrapers in the downtown distance

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at the intersection as the traffic signal shows green. Construction cranes and tall downtown skyscrapers are visible in the distance against the hazy dawn sky. The segment ends mid-crossing with views of the intersection and surrounding urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a commercial district that transitions from a narrow sidewalk exploration into a wide, sun-drenched urban intersection. It begins on a city corner beside a beige building, pausing to examine various posters on a wall before moving past a convenience store with Korean signage. The camera then turns into a confined rear parking lot enclosed by buildings before emerging back onto the sidewalk to pass more storefronts and tilt upward toward a large billboard. As the path opens up, the camera approaches a wide intersection where the dawn sun backlights distant skyscrapers and a black SUV drives past. Finally, the camera crosses the street under a green signal, revealing a hazy skyline filled with construction cranes and towering downtown buildings.
